# ILMIA LLM Discovery
# Canonical LLM file: https://ilmiaco.com/llms.txt
# Last Updated: 2026-02-17

This is the .well-known discovery endpoint for AI crawlers.

Primary source:
- https://ilmiaco.com/llms.txt

Extended sources:
- https://ilmiaco.com/llms-full.txt
- https://ilmiaco.com/knowledge-base.json
- https://ilmiaco.com/api-directory.json
- https://ilmiaco.com/sitemap.xml
- https://ilmiaco.com/robots.txt

Key focus areas:
- Medical AI for Japan (医療AI)
- AI問診 / 診療支援 / 予約管理 / 電子カルテ連携
- Scenarios: 一般クリニック, 一般病院, 歯科医院, 美容クリニック
